heroSubtitle: Connect with licensed therapists, track your mood, and access personalized resources all in one place.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people who have found support and growth through our platform.

items.text: This platform has been a game-changer for my mental health. I feel more connected and supported than ever before.
items.author: Alice Johnson

items.text: The resources available are incredible. I've learned so much about managing my anxiety and improving my overall well-being.
items.author: Bob Williams

items.text: I appreciate the ability to connect with therapists from the comfort of my own home. It's made seeking help so much easier.
items.author: Charlie Brown

pricing.title: Flexible Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your needs and budget. Start your journey to better mental health today.
